narrative.headline: 2022 Subaru Legacy: visibility and wiper issues lead the complaints
narrative.summary: Owners filed 31 complaints with NHTSA. Visibility/Wiper is by far the most reported area at 52%, well ahead of the electrical system (10%). No fires, injuries, or deaths are reported across any area. The two vehicle speed control complaints are the only ones tied to crashes (2 in all), so that area is worth a close look on a test drive.

issues.title: Visibility/Wiper
issues.blurb: The single biggest complaint area: 16 reports (52%), more than half of all complaints. No crashes, fires, or injuries reported. Check the windshield and wipers closely.

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Second most reported: 3 reports (10%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries. A smaller but recurring complaint area.

issues.title: Vehicle Speed Control
issues.blurb: Only 2 reports (6%), but both are tied to crashes, the only crashes in the data. No injuries reported. Worth testing acceleration and braking carefully.

issues.title: Forward Collision Avoidance
issues.blurb: 2 reports (6%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries. A minor complaint area in the driver-assist features.

issues.title: Lane Departure
issues.blurb: 2 reports (6%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries. A minor complaint area tied to the lane-keeping assist.
